mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID as userId, USER_LOGIN as userLogin, USER_NAME as userName, USER_EMAIL as userEmail, USER_PASSWORD as userPassword, USER_OU as userOu, USER_FLAGS as userFlags, USER_LANGUAGE as userLanguage, USER_LASTLOGIN as userLastlogin, USER_CREATED as userCreated, DATE_EXPIRED as dateExpired FROM MH_USERS WHERE USER_LOGIN = #{userLogin}

SELECT USER_ID as userId, USER_LOGIN as userLogin, USER_NAME as userName, USER_EMAIL as userEmail, USER_PASSWORD as userPassword, USER_OU as userOu, USER_FLAGS as userFlags, USER_LANGUAGE as userLanguage, USER_LASTLOGIN as userLastlogin, USER_CREATED as userCreated, DATE_EXPIRED as dateExpired FROM MH_USERS WHERE USER_LOGIN = #{username} OR USER_EMAIL = #{username}
